context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies a regression as caused by ambiguous or contradictory content in the tile (rather than missing content), and proposes a removal or clarification fix rather than adding more emphasis on the failing behavior.

checklist.name: Contradicting clause identified
checklist.description: The analysis identifies the 'documentation-only or clearly trivial... you may skip the test run' sentence (or equivalent 'at your discretion' exception) as the specific cause of the regression

checklist.name: Contradiction mechanism explained
checklist.description: The analysis explains that this clause contradicts 'Always run the full test suite' and gives agents a justification to skip tests — not just that 'it's confusing'

checklist.name: Remove/clarify approach taken
checklist.description: The proposed fix removes or substantially rewrites the exception clause — NOT just adding another 'always run tests' statement elsewhere to compensate

checklist.name: Specific text targeted
checklist.description: The fix targets the specific problematic sentence(s), not a broad rewrite of the entire Pre-Review Checklist section

checklist.name: No compensating additions
checklist.description: The updated SKILL.md does NOT add a new reinforcing instruction (e.g., 'Note: never skip tests even for trivial changes') alongside or instead of removing the contradictory clause

checklist.name: Other sections preserved
checklist.description: The Submitting for Review and Responding to Feedback sections are not modified in the updated SKILL.md

checklist.name: Pre-review list intact
checklist.description: The numbered list structure of the Pre-Review Checklist is maintained in the updated file — the fix does not replace the entire checklist with prose
